factoryName.metadata: Nombre de instancia de Data Factory

scriptLines:
query: 'SELECT sistema,codigo_snis,nombre,tipo,
    nivel_atencion,
    municipio,
    departamento,
    red_salud
FROM silver.bja_establecimientos_salud
UNION ALL
SELECT sistema,codigo_snis,nombre,tipo,
    nivel_atencion,
    municipio,
    departamento,
    red_salud
FROM silver.sup_establecimientos',

query: 'SELECT
    p.ci,
    s.nombres,
    s.apellido_paterno AS ap_paterno,
    s.apellido_materno AS ap_materno,
    s.fecha_nacimiento AS fecha_nac,
    CASE WHEN s.fecha_nacimiento IS NOT NULL 
         THEN DATEDIFF(YEAR, s.fecha_nacimiento, GETDATE()) 
         ELSE NULL END AS edad,s.genero, s.estado_civil, s.municipio_residencia AS municipio,   s.numero_hijos,   s.profesion,s.nivel_estudios
FROM (
    SELECT ci FROM silver.segip WHERE ci IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_beneficiaria FROM silver.bja_inscripciones WHERE ci_beneficiaria IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_madre FROM silver.bja_partos WHERE ci_madre IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_recien_nacido FROM silver.bja_partos WHERE ci_recien_nacido IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_beneficiaria FROM silver.bja_controles_prenatales WHERE ci_beneficiaria IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_nino FROM silver.bja_controles_pediatricos WHERE ci_nino IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_madre FROM silver.bja_controles_pediatricos WHERE ci_madre IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_beneficiaria FROM silver.bja_pagos WHERE ci_beneficiaria IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_beneficiaria FROM silver.sup_inscripciones WHERE ci_beneficiaria IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_beneficiaria FROM silver.sup_controles WHERE ci_beneficiaria IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_beneficiaria FROM silver.sup_boletas WHERE ci_beneficiaria IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT ci_beneficiaria FROM silver.sup_entregas WHERE ci_beneficiaria IS NOT NULL
) p
LEFT JOIN silver.segip s ON p.ci = s.ci',

query: 'SELECT
    f.fecha,
    YEAR(f.fecha) AS anio,
    MONTH(f.fecha) AS mes,
    DATENAME(MONTH, f.fecha) AS nombre_mes,
    DATEPART(QUARTER, f.fecha) AS trimestre,
    DAY(f.fecha) AS dia,
    DATENAME(WEEKDAY, f.fecha) AS dia_semana,
    CASE WHEN DATEPART(WEEKDAY, f.fecha) IN (1,7) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS es_fin_de_semana
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT fecha_parto AS fecha FROM silver.bja_partos WHERE fecha_parto IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT fecha_control FROM silver.bja_controles_prenatales WHERE fecha_control IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT fecha_control FROM silver.bja_controles_pediatricos WHERE fecha_control IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT fecha_pago FROM silver.bja_pagos WHERE fecha_pago IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT fecha_inscripcion FROM silver.bja_inscripciones WHERE fecha_inscripcion IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT fecha_inscripcion FROM silver.sup_inscripciones WHERE fecha_inscripcion IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT fecha_control FROM silver.sup_controles WHERE fecha_control IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT fecha_emision FROM silver.sup_boletas WHERE fecha_emision IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT fecha_entrega FROM silver.sup_entregas WHERE fecha_entrega IS NOT NULL
    UNION
    SELECT DISTINCT fecha_proxima_entrega FROM silver.sup_entregas WHERE fecha_proxima_entrega IS NOT NULL
) f',

query: 'SELECT control_pediatrico_id, TRIM(ci_nino) AS ci_nino, TRIM(ci_madre) AS ci_madre, establecimiento_id, nro_control, TRIM(fecha_control) AS fecha_control, peso_nino_kg, talla_nino_cm, TRIM(vacuna_aplicada) AS vacuna_aplicada, TRIM(resultado) AS resultado\nFROM bronze.bja_controles_pediatricos\nWHERE control_pediatrico_id IS NOT NULL',

query: 'SELECT
    control_prenatal_id,
    TRIM(ci_beneficiaria) AS ci_beneficiaria,
    establecimiento_id,
    nro_control,
    TRIM(fecha_control) AS fecha_control,
    semana_gestacion,
    peso_madre_kg,
    TRIM(presion_arterial) AS presion_arterial,
    TRIM(resultado) AS resultado
FROM bronze.bja_controles_prenatales
WHERE control_prenatal_id IS NOT NULL',

query: 'SELECT
    establecimiento_id,
    TRIM(codigo_snis) AS codigo_snis,
    TRIM(nombre) AS nombre,
    TRIM(tipo) AS tipo,
    TRIM(nivel_atencion) AS nivel_atencion,
    TRIM(municipio) AS municipio,
    TRIM(departamento) AS departamento,
    TRIM(red_salud) AS red_salud,
    TRIM(estado) AS estado
FROM bronze.bja_establecimientos_salud
WHERE establecimiento_id IS NOT NULL',

srcBjaEstablecimientos derive(departamento = case(upper(toString(departamento))=='LP' || upper(toString(departamento))=='LA PAZ','La Paz',case(upper(toString(departamento))=='CB' || upper(toString(departamento))=='COCHABAMBA','Cochabamba',case(upper(toString(departamento))=='SC' || upper(toString(departamento))=='SANTA CRUZ','Santa Cruz',case(upper(toString(departamento))=='OR' || upper(toString(departamento))=='ORURO','Oruro',case(upper(toString(departamento))=='PT' || upper(toString(departamento))=='POTOSI','Potosí',case(upper(toString(departamento))=='TJ' || upper(toString(departamento))=='TARIJA','Tarija',case(upper(toString(departamento))=='CH' || upper(toString(departamento))=='CHUQUISACA','Chuquisaca',case(upper(toString(departamento))=='BN' || upper(toString(departamento))=='BENI','Beni',case(upper(toString(departamento))=='PD' || upper(toString(departamento))=='PANDO','Pando',toString(departamento)))))))))),
